mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author, post_date FROM news ORDER BY post_date DESC

SELECT news.id, news.title, news.author, news.post_date, news_details.article, news_details.photo FROM news
LEFT JOIN news_details ON news.id = news_details.news_id WHERE news.id = #{id}

SELECT news.id, news.title, news.author, news.post_date, news_details.article, news_details.photo FROM news LEFT JOIN news_details ON news.id = news_details.news_id ORDER BY news.post_date DESC, news.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (title, author, post_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{postDate})
